## Summary

What changed and why?

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] Package/install
- [ ] Tests/QA
- [ ] Architecture

## Validation

Paste the commands you ran and summarize the result.

## Risk

What could this break?

## Screenshots

Include screenshots for UI-facing changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, local projects, or generated runtime files included
- [ ] Unsupported capabilities degrade explicitly
- [ ] Package/resource paths are not hard-coded to a local checkout
- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior changed
